程序包 com.yuki.webapp.mapper

接口 UserMapper

@Mapper public interface UserMapper

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    add(String userName, String userPassword, String userEmail)
     
    Boolean
    checkUserEmail(String userEmail)
     
    User
    findByUserEmail(String userEmail)
     
    UserDTO
    getUserInfoById(Integer userId)
     
    String
    selectPasswordByEmail(String userEmail)
     
    void
    update(User user)
     
    int
    updatePasswordByEmail(String userEmail, String newPassword)
     

  • 方法详细资料

    • findByUserEmail

      @Select("select * from user where user_email=#{userEmail}") User findByUserEmail(String userEmail)

    • checkUserEmail

      @Select("SELECT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1\n FROM user\n WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}\n);") Boolean checkUserEmail(String userEmail)

    • add

      @Insert("insert into user(user_name,user_password,user_email,user_registration_time,user_update_time) values(#{userName},#{userPassword},#{userEmail},now(),now())") void add(String userName, String userPassword, String userEmail)

    • update

      @Update("update user set user_name=#{userName},user_update_time=#{userUpdateTime},user_gender=#{userGender},user_university=#{userUniversity},user_major=#{userMajor},user_information=#{userInformation} where user_id=#{userId}") void update(User user)

    • getUserInfoById

      @Select("select * from user where user_id = #{userId}") UserDTO getUserInfoById(Integer userId)

    • selectPasswordByEmail

      @Select("select user_password from user where user_email = #{userEmail}") String selectPasswordByEmail(String userEmail)

    • updatePasswordByEmail

      @Update("update user set user_password = #{newPassword} where user_email = #{userEmail}") int updatePasswordByEmail(@Param("userEmail") String userEmail, @Param("newPassword") String newPassword)
